memoryArtifacts.headline: Land of Ralph son of Hubert
memoryArtifacts.description:
Crich was a settlement in Domesday Book, in the hundred of Morleystone and the county of Derbyshire.

It had a recorded population of 6 households in 1086, putting it in the smallest 40% of settlements recorded in Domesday

memoryArtifacts.headline: CRICH PARISH which consists of the villages of Crich, Fritchley and Whatstandwell Shuckstone Cross and Holy Wells Shuckstone Cross
memoryArtifacts.description:
CRICH PARISH
which consists of the villages of Crich, Fritchley and Whatstandwell
Shuckstone Cross and Holy Wells
Shuckstone Cross
The route north out of Crich passed by Shuckstone – a place separately identified in the Domesday Survey. Here, at a junction coming up from Robin Hood and Wakebridge was to be found Shuckstone Cross where, in 1788, an earthen pot of copper Roman coins was found. It is known that the Romans exploited the local lead from about A.D. 117.

A 'shuck' was a robber and a murderer.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ranulph Fitz-Hubert de Rie於1045年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy41歲，母親Albreda Preaux38歲。他於大約1063年與Mathilda de Derbyshire在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1086年在英國德比夏爾享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ranulph Fitz-Hubert de Rie于1045年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy41岁，母亲Albreda Preaux38岁。他于大约1063年与Mathilda de Derbyshire在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1086年在英国德比夏爾享年41岁。

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Ranulph Fitz-Hubert de Rie was born in 1045, in Normandy, France, his father, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, was 41 and his mother, Albreda Preaux, was 38. He married Mathilda de Derbyshire about 1063, in Falaise, Calvados, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1086, in Derbyshire, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ranulph Fitz-Hubert de Rie est né en 1045, à Normandie, France, son père, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Albreda Preaux, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Mathilda de Derbyshire environ 1063, à Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1086, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ranulph Fitz-Hubert de Rie 1045 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy 41 und seine Mutter Albreda Preaux 38. Er hat um 1063 in Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich Mathilda de Derbyshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1086 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulph Fitz-Hubert de Rie è nato il nel 1045 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Albreda Preaux, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Mathilda de Derbyshire circa 1063, nel Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1086, nel Derbyshire, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ranulph Fitz-Hubert de Rieが1045年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandyは41歳，母Albreda Preauxは38歳であった。約1063年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスファレイゼでMathilda de Derbyshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1086年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ranulph Fitz-Hubert de Rie(이)가 1045년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda Preaux(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1063년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 팔레이스에서 Mathilda de Derbyshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1086년 영국 더비실르에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulph Fitz-Hubert de Rie nasceu em 1045, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Albreda Preaux, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilda de Derbyshire aproximadamente 1063, em Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1086, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ranulph Fitz-Hubert de Rie родился в 1045 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Albreda Preaux, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilda de Derbyshire около 1063 г. в местности фалеис, калвадос, норманди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1086 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

sm.from 1066 to 1086: mai le 1066 e o'o I le 1086

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ranulph Fitz-Hubert de Rie nació en 1045, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Albreda Preaux, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Mathilda de Derbyshire aproximadamente 1063, en Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1086, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
